description: A person or entity involved in a news story, such as a politician, celebrity, witness, or expert

name.description: The full name of the figure

role.description: The figure's primary role in the context of the news

affiliation.description: The organization, party, or group the figure is associated with

relevance.description: Why this figure is relevant to the current news context

statements.description: Key statements or quotes attributed to this figure in reporting
